sentences.arabic: عَلِيُّ بْنُ أَبِي طَالِبٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ كَانَ ابْنَ عَمِّ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَرَابِعَ الْخُلَفَاءِ الرَّاشِدِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ali ibn Ebi Talib, radijallahu anhu, bio je amidžić Vjerovjesnika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, i četvrti od pravednih halifa.
sentences.translationEn: Ali ibn Abi Talib, may Allah be pleased with him, was the cousin of the Prophet, peace be upon him, and the fourth of the Rightly Guided Caliphs.

sentences.arabic: آمَنَ بِاللَّهِ وَهُوَ صَغِيرٌ وَنَشَأَ فِي بَيْتِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ.
sentences.translation: Povjerovao je u Allaha dok je bio mali i odrastao u kući Vjerovjesnika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem.
sentences.translationEn: He believed in Allah from a young age and grew up in the Prophet's household.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ مَعْرُوفًا بِشَجَاعَتِهِ فِي الْمَعَارِكِ وَبِعِلْمِهِ الْوَاسِعِ [سِيرَةُ ابْنِ هِشَامٍ].
sentences.translation: Bio je, radijallahu anhu, poznat po svojoj hrabrosti u bitkama i po svom velikom znanju [Ibn Hišamova Sira].
sentences.translationEn: He was known for his courage in battle and his vast knowledge [Ibn Hisham's Sira].

sentences.arabic: قَالَ عَنْهُ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «أَنْتَ مِنِّي وَأَنَا مِنْكَ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ الْمَغَازِي].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je za njega: «Ti si od mene i ja sam od tebe» [Bilježi Buharija u Knjizi o vojnim pohodima].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet said of him: 'You are from me and I am from you' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Military Expeditions].

sentences.arabic: وَالدَّرْسُ مِنْ حَيَاتِهِ أَنَّ الْإِيمَانَ الصَّادِقَ يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الشَّجَاعَةِ وَالْعِلْمِ وَالتَّوَاضُعِ.
sentences.translation: Pouka iz njegovog života je da istinski iman spaja hrabrost, znanje i skromnost.
sentences.translationEn: The lesson from his life is that sincere faith unites courage, knowledge, and humility.
